name: Seer Elf
description:
You have an inborn ability to detect and understand magical phenomena. You can cast the cantrip as an arcane innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

In addition, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to and to of a magical nature. These skill actions typically use the Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion skill.
